faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in East Tremont?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in East Tremont typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home or apartment, the severity of the infestation, and whether multiple rooms or units require treatment. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most flea treatments show immediate results, with adult fleas dying within hours of application. However, complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as eggs and larvae continue to hatch. We often recommend a follow-up treatment after 14 days to ensure all life stages are eliminated for lasting results.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved flea treatments that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces dry completely. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your East Tremont home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my East Tremont apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation is essential for effective treatment. We recommend vacuuming all carpets and upholstery, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during treatment. Our technicians will provide a detailed preparation checklist when scheduling your East Tremont flea treatment appointment to ensure maximum effectiveness.
